title: Excalidraw
description: Settings for the Excalidraw drawing extension.

syncTheme.title: Sync theme with JupyterLab
syncTheme.description: Automatically set Excalidraw to dark/light mode based on the JupyterLab theme.

gridMode.title: Grid mode
gridMode.description: Show a background grid on new drawings.

viewBackgroundColor.title: Background color
viewBackgroundColor.description: Default canvas background color for new drawings (CSS color value). Leave empty to use Excalidraw's default.
